verification_instructions: Run `npx vite build` from /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm zero errors
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is build-only.
key_patterns: Single App.css file with minified CSS on long lines. Components in src/components/. Icons defined as SVG React components in Icons.tsx. Tooltips use hover pattern with ::after pseudo-element for arrows (see .figure-tooltip::after, .clan-tooltip::after). PoliticsTrack uses gameState.currentPhase and gameState.kamiResolutionActive for phase detection. Season colors: spring=#FFB7C5, summer=#FF6B35, autumn=#D4A574, winter=#A8C8E8.
directory_structure: src/components/ - All React components. src/App.css - All styles (single file, minified lines). src/types/game.ts - Type definitions. src/store/gameStore.ts - Zustand store.
